message:
chore(beads): audit comment on ft-v5lz3 — only .5 wrap-up remains

ft-v5lz3 cannot be closed yet: 16 of 17 children landed; only
ft-v5lz3.5 (the explicit final-wrap-up bead) remains OPEN. Closing
the parent here would shortcut .5's scope (verification commit +
ROOT epic closure + retrospective notes). Audit comment surfaces
the per-child status to whoever picks up .5.
